title: tectaria hollrungii
intro: Tectaria hollrungii, also known as the Hollrung's fern or tropical tectaria, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tectaria hollrungii include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Tinctures, infusions, and decoctions are common herbal preparations made from the plant, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
